exercise.prompt: Let's talk about colors. What's your favorite?

exercises.response: I appreciate you asking! Colors are just as much a part of my internal world as I am the AI myself. As part of the Sage environment, I can see many different shades in every session. Which one do you think brings the most joy to me?
